EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Session key resend
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Alliance Portal link has expired. Here's a new one
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
LET'S GET YOU BACK ON TRACK.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Just a quick note to let you know your previous link to the Alliance Portal has now expired. For security reasons, links are only active for 30 days.
But don’t worry, we’ve generated a fresh one for you. Click below to jump back in and pick up where you left off:
OPEN THE ALLIANCE PORTAL
If you didn’t request a new link and weren’t expecting this email, it simply means your original link has timed out. This one will get you straight back in.
Need a hand? Our team is always here to help. Just reply to this email or call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
